title: Database connection leak in loop
diff:
diff --git a/batch_worker.py b/batch_worker.py
--- a/batch_worker.py
+++ b/batch_worker.py
@@ -3,6 +3,8 @@ def process_batch(items):
     for item in items:
-        with get_db() as db:
-            db.execute(transform(item))
+        db = get_db()
+        db.execute(transform(item))

ground_truth.description: Resource leak: DB connection not closed in loop, removed context manager
